problem_title: KYT monitoring gaps slow Singapore compliance
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to integrate wallet risk signals with jurisdiction-specific Singapore requirements. This disconnection creates manual workloads, delays case reviews and weakens traceability across KYT operations and regulatory workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates KYT provider outputs, jurisdictional rules, and case workflows into a unified system that streamlines Singapore-specific wallet risk review and preserves audit-ready evidence for compliance teams.
workflow_title: From wallet risk to regulatory review
workflow_description: SFTY consolidates wallet and transaction risk signals, routes alerts into structured case reviews, and preserves evidence to support Singapore-specific compliance decisions.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond isolated wallet alerts. One decision-ready layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects KYT provider outputs into structured workflows, cases and audit evidence to support Singapore-specific compliance and clear operational control for VASPs.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs managing Singapore-specific KYT compliance by connecting provider data, preserving audit-ready evidence and enabling enterprise-grade deployment controls.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for Singapore VASP compliance?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides Singapore VASPs a connected compliance layer to connect KYT monitoring, regulatory rules, case workflows, evidence and reporting under jurisdiction-specific policies and operational controls.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support Singapore KYT workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures wallet risk signals, transaction reviews and alert triage into consistent workflows aligned with Singapore regulations, linking KYT outputs to cases, decisions and regulatory rule triggers.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready KYT evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case histories and supporting evidence in audit-ready packages that document KYT workflows and compliance decisions under Singapore’s jurisdictional requirements.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing KYT providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects to multiple KYT providers used by Singapore VASPs, aggregating their outputs into one workflow layer without requiring provider replacement.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace Travel Rule or KYT providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace Travel Rule or KYT providers but turns their outputs into structured reviews, adjudications, case evidence and reporting for operational scalability.
final_title: Connect Singapore KYT workflows into audit-ready cases
final_description: Review how SFTY structures wallet risk, provider outputs and Travel Rule data into controlled Singapore-specific compliance workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
